name: Without Your Help I Can't Become the King of the Pirates!!!!

issues.description: The condition 'HasRestingDon' with count 0 is completely wrong. The text requires 'if you have 1 or less Life cards', which should be a condition checking life count, not don availability.

The PlayFromHand action is missing the filter for '[Sanji]' cards. The text says 'yellow {Straw Hat Crew} type Character cards OR [Sanji]', meaning Sanji cards (even non-yellow or non-Straw Hat Crew) with cost 5 or less should also be playable.
The PlayFromHand action should have 'count: 1' to match 'play up to 1' in the text.

The PlayFromHand action should only be conditional (execute only if life <= 1), but currently it's part of the same unconditional effect as the PowerBoost. This needs to be restructured or the condition needs to apply specifically to this action.
